inputs.prompt: A confident Chilean businesswoman in her late 30s, dressed in a casual light gray blouse, stands in the right third of the image with arms crossed and a calm, assured expression, serving as the clear focal point. In the foreground, subtle integrated holographic cyan icons representing legal responsibility, financial credit, and operational load float above and slightly to the left of her shoulder, minimal and refined, adding a layer of metaphorical meaning about control and management. The midground features a sleek, minimalist corporate office environment with clean lines, large glass windows, and muted structural elements in soft gradients from icy gray to tinted bluish-gray, evoking order, stability, and a calm financial atmosphere. The background is softly blurred with shallow depth of field, showing a hint of a modern Santiago skyline filtered in cool turquoise hues, adding context but maintaining focus on the subject. The image uses professional commercial photography style with photorealistic rendering, commercial retouching for smooth skin and fabrics, and a balanced cold-to-neutral lighting setup with unified lighting from the left to create soft, natural shadows enhancing depth and texture on skin and materials. The color palette is strictly limited to brand tones: dominant deep green (#336666) accents on the holographic icons and select office highlights, supported by white (#ffffff) and ice gray (#cdd9da) throughout, with subtle dark gray (#333333) shadows to ground the composition. The overall mood conveys serene professionalism, intellectual control, and aspirational clarity, suitable for a high-end financial services campaign. The composition respects generous negative space around the subject to allow visual breathing room and future text overlays. Rendered in ultra-high 8K resolution for impeccable detail, perfect balance of whites, and a refined clean commercial finish.
